medical.title: Medical Emergency Guidance
medical.snippet: If someone is unconscious or not breathing, call emergency services now if safe. Apply pressure to heavy bleeding and keep airway clear. Help is being dispatched; reply with any injuries or number of people.

trapped.title: If You Are Trapped
trapped.snippet: If you are trapped, stay calm and conserve air. Make noise to attract rescuers and avoid risky movements. If possible, send your precise location.

supplies.title: Supplies Request Guidance
supplies.snippet: Tell us how many people need supplies and any urgent medical needs. Specify types of supplies required (water, food, baby supplies, medication) and accessibility constraints.

shelter.title: Shelter Guidance
shelter.snippet: If you need shelter, move to the nearest safe shelter if possible. We'll provide shelter details and availability shortly. If injured, call emergency services first.

fire.title: Fire Safety
fire.snippet: If there is an active fire, evacuate immediately if it is safe to do so. Move to a safe distance and call emergency services. If trapped, indicate your exact position.

flood.title: Flood Guidance
flood.snippet: Move to higher ground immediately and avoid flood water. Do not drive through flooded roads. If you cannot move safely, describe your location and wait for rescue.

power_outage.title: Power Outage Safety
power_outage.snippet: Use flashlights instead of candles when possible. If someone depends on electrically powered medical equipment, indicate this now for priority response.

road_hazard.title: Road & Traffic Incident Guidance
road_hazard.snippet: If anyone is injured, call emergency services. Move to safety off the road if possible and warn other road users. Provide vehicle and injury details when safe.

other.title: General Guidance
other.snippet: We've logged your report. Please move away from immediate danger and call emergency services if needed. Provide additional details to help responders.
